title: Leaves Drop OP Loot
description: Imagine breaking the leaves on a tree, trying to get saplings; but instead you get op loot. This is good for manhunts or just fun gaming. Shears + leaves = Op Loot.
body:
Break any leaf block with shears and unleash chaos. Each leaf drops 5 random OP items — from netherite gear and enchanted golden apples to blaze rods, shulker shells, elytras, and more. No client mods needed. Just shear, break, and profit
--Video Coming Out Soon--
https://youtube.com/@Zephrodak
